Book Your Event
What I Do
🎤

Mobile Karaoke

I bring the full karaoke experience straight to your venue — powered by a KaraFun Pro professional account, the industry-leading licensed karaoke platform trusted by KJs and entertainers worldwide.

That means: 30,000+ songs in HD audio & video, key & tempo adjustment per singer, live queue management, and a catalog updated with new releases every month — all fully licensed for public performance.

🎧

DJ & Music

Between sets or all night long — curated DJ sets to keep your guests on the dance floor from first song to last.

🎙️

MC & Hosting

With a background in TV and musical theatre, I bring professionalism and personality to every mic moment.

🔊

Sound Engineering

Full professional PA system. You focus on the fun — I handle the tech so everything sounds exactly right.

🏆

Team Building

Karaoke-based team building that actually works. Get your team singing, laughing, and connecting in a way no boardroom ever could.

📍

I Come To You

Private homes, corporate venues, event halls, restaurants — if you have a space and a crowd, I'll bring the show. No venue too big or too small.

Birthday Parties
